problem_solved: Healthcare organizations struggle to aggregate and analyze data from multiple sources to identify disparities, measure outcomes, and drive improvement
solution_description: Healthcare analytics and data platform unifying clinical, financial, and operational data. AI-assisted benchmarking and insights for identifying improvement opportunities. Includes clinical analytics library, performance management, and workflow automation tools
notes: Healthcare analytics leader. Can support SDOH measurement and health equity analytics but not purpose-built for SDOH. Strong data infrastructure and analytics capabilities. Medium Varden fit - more general analytics vs. SDOH-specific
